import io
import string
import list

fn insert_sorted(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result = []
  mut inserted = false
  for y in sorted
    if not inserted and x <= y
      result = list.push(result, x)
      inserted = true
    end
    result = list.push(result, y)
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

fn parse_numbers(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  mut nums = []
  mut token = ""
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        if not string.is_empty(token)
          match string.parse_int(token)
          when Some(v)
            nums = list.push(nums, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          token = ""
        end
      else
        token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(token)
    match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(v)
      nums = list.push(nums, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  nums
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let nums = parse_numbers(line)

mut sorted = []
for x in nums
  sorted = insert_sorted(sorted, x)
end

mut out = ""
mut first = true
for x in sorted
  if first
    out = "#{x}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{x}"
  end
end
println(out)
